subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: POC verified on first attempt (verifier-v1 OK: F1.acq=2 F1.rel=2 F3.goto=8 F5.ret=5 F2.if=8).

errIsZeroAtGoto needed one refine iteration: iter 1 used `a.getRValue().getValue() != "0"` to spot non-zero assignments, but PTR_ERR(tfm) is a call expression with no constant getValue(), so the IS_ERR branch in _fixed was wrongly flagged. Iter 2 changed the guard to `no Assignment to errVar at all in the then-block before goto` — works regardless of literal-vs-call RHS.
Stage-5 oracle: final.ql fires on kexec_calculate_store_digests_buggy line 65 (the `if (!sha_regions) goto out_free_desc;` shortcut), silent on _fixed. No FP variants present in POC.
